description:
Run Unity PlayMode tests through the new flow orchestrator skeleton.

This tool is CLI-first and resilient by design: it creates a durable task record, runs background orchestration steps, and allows polling by task_id.

Use `action=start` to create and launch a flow task, then use `action=status` with the same task_id to query progress/result.

action.description: Flow action. `start` creates a new task. `status` checks an existing task. `wait` blocks until task completion or timeout. `cancel` marks a running task as cancelled.

project_path.description: Absolute path to the Unity project root. Required.

timeout_sec.description: Only used for action=`wait`. Defaults to 120.
